attributes.content:
## Overview

The Interview Feedback card gives the workspace a structured home for structured interview evaluation with criteria scores, notes, recommendation, and decision.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Interview Feedback acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Contact]]** -- Interview Feedback often needs a person-level reference for ownership, communication, or accountability.
- **[[Organization]]** -- Interview Feedback frequently sits inside an account, company, or team-level relationship context.
- **[[Task]]** -- Interview Feedback often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Interview Feedback can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Document]]** -- Interview Feedback can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Job Offer]]** -- Job Offer can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Interview Feedback.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Interview Feedback as the structured home for structured interview evaluation with criteria scores, notes, recommendation, and decision and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Interview Feedback when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Interview Feedback stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.

cardInfo.name: Interview Feedback
cardInfo.summary: Structured interview evaluation with criteria scores, notes, recommendation, and decision.
